nativeProps: HTML figure attributes plus imageProps for the owned img

props.name: alt/decorative
props.type: discriminated informative or decorative alternative contract

compositionPolicy.alternatives: Informative images require non-empty alt; decorative images require decorative=true and an empty alternative.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Status UI, announcements, and onLoadStateChange are absent when showStatusRail is false; source policy is consumer-controlled.
